examples: What’s the difference between a prowler and a stalker?
"Well now," said the prowler, "is that dead fellow alive?"
Goddess of fate always is a friend of the carefree prowler.
The carrier-based Prowler aircraft that jammed Taliban ground communications have their origins in the Korean War.
Ashby was at the controls of the EA-6B Prowler when it sliced the cable of a ski gondola on February 3, 1998.
